steps.data:
<?php
// Force HTTP_AUTHORIZATION into PHP_AUTH_USER/PW (WASM SAPI doesn't auto-populate)
if (!empty($_SERVER['HTTP_AUTHORIZATION']) && empty($_SERVER['PHP_AUTH_USER'])) {
    if (preg_match('/Basic\s+(.*)$/i', $_SERVER['HTTP_AUTHORIZATION'], $m)) {
        $creds = explode(':', base64_decode($m[1]), 2);
        $_SERVER['PHP_AUTH_USER'] = $creds[0] ?? '';
        $_SERVER['PHP_AUTH_PW']   = $creds[1] ?? '';
    }
}
add_filter('wp_is_application_passwords_available', '__return_true');
add_filter('wp_is_application_passwords_available_for_user', '__return_true');

steps.code: <?php require '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $u = get_user_by('login','admin'); if (!$u) { echo 'ERR: no admin user\n'; exit; } list($pw) = WP_Application_Passwords::create_new_application_password($u->ID, ['name' => 'spike-001']); file_put_contents('/wordpress/wp-content/spike-app-password.txt', $pw); echo 'APP_PASS_WRITTEN len=' . strlen($pw) . PHP_EOL;
